# Azure DevOps Agents with PAT authentication

Deploys self-hosted Azure DevOps agents on Azure Container Apps using a Personal Access Token (scope: `Agent Pools (Read & manage)`) for agent registration.

Networking inputs (VNet subnets and the private DNS zone for the registry) are expected from the ALZ Vending Module.

```hcl
module "azuredevops_agents" {
  source = "../.."

  # --- ALZ Corp networking (provided by ALZ Vending Module) ---
  container_app_subnet_id                       = var.container_app_subnet_id
  container_registry_private_endpoint_subnet_id = var.container_registry_private_endpoint_subnet_id
  location                                      = "swedencentral"
  postfix                                       = "adoagt"
  version_control_system_organization           = var.azuredevops_organization_url
  # --- VCS Configuration ---
  version_control_system_type    = "azuredevops"
  container_registry_dns_zone_id = var.container_registry_dns_zone_id
  # --- Resource Group (set false if provided by ALZ Vending) ---
  resource_group_creation_enabled = true
  tags = {
    environment = "production"
    managed_by  = "terraform"
  }
  version_control_system_authentication_method = "pat"
  version_control_system_personal_access_token = var.azuredevops_personal_access_token
  version_control_system_pool_name             = var.azuredevops_pool_name
}
```

<!-- markdownlint-disable MD033 -->
## Requirements

The following requirements are needed by this module:

- <a name="requirement_terraform"></a> [terraform](#requirement\_terraform) (>= 1.9.0)

- <a name="requirement_azurerm"></a> [azurerm](#requirement\_azurerm) (~> 4.20)

## Resources

No resources.

<!-- markdownlint-disable MD013 -->
## Required Inputs

The following input variables are required:

### <a name="input_azuredevops_organization_url"></a> [azuredevops\_organization\_url](#input\_azuredevops\_organization\_url)

Description: The Azure DevOps organization URL (e.g. https://dev.azure.com/my-org).

Type: `string`

### <a name="input_azuredevops_personal_access_token"></a> [azuredevops\_personal\_access\_token](#input\_azuredevops\_personal\_access\_token)

Description: Azure DevOps PAT with Agent Pools (Read & manage) scope.

Type: `string`

### <a name="input_azuredevops_pool_name"></a> [azuredevops\_pool\_name](#input\_azuredevops\_pool\_name)

Description: The Azure DevOps agent pool name.

Type: `string`

### <a name="input_container_app_subnet_id"></a> [container\_app\_subnet\_id](#input\_container\_app\_subnet\_id)

Description: The resource ID of the Container App subnet from ALZ Vending.

Type: `string`

### <a name="input_container_registry_private_endpoint_subnet_id"></a> [container\_registry\_private\_endpoint\_subnet\_id](#input\_container\_registry\_private\_endpoint\_subnet\_id)

Description: The resource ID of the ACR private endpoint subnet from ALZ Vending.

Type: `string`

## Optional Inputs

The following input variables are optional (have default values):

### <a name="input_container_registry_dns_zone_id"></a> [container\_registry\_dns\_zone\_id](#input\_container\_registry\_dns\_zone\_id)

Description: The private DNS zone ID for ACR. Null if handled by Azure Policy.

Type: `string`

Default: `null`

## Outputs

No outputs.

## Data Collection

The software may collect information about you and your use of the software and send it to Microsoft. Microsoft may use this information to provide services and improve our products and services. You may turn off the telemetry as described in the repository. There are also some features in the software that may enable you and Microsoft to collect data from users of your applications. Your use of the software operates as your consent to these practices.
